title: Customer-managed keys now support MLflow managed evaluation features
body:
You can now use the following MLflow managed evaluation features in workspaces encrypted with [customer-managed keys (CMK)](/aws/en/security/keys/customer-managed-keys):

* [Production monitoring](/aws/en/mlflow3/genai/eval-monitor/production-monitoring) of GenAI apps with MLflow 3 scorers.
* The [Review App](/aws/en/mlflow3/genai/human-feedback/expert-feedback/label-existing-traces) for collecting expert feedback on traces.
* [Evaluation datasets](/aws/en/mlflow3/genai/eval-monitor/build-eval-dataset). The catalog that stores the dataset must not itself be CMK-encrypted.
